name: Hot and Sour Soup B1
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the cloud ear mushrooms and tiger lily buds in half a cup of warm water for 10 minutes. Drain and shred the mushrooms. Cut the tiger lily buds into one-half inch lengths.
2. Measure and place all remaining ingredients nearby for cooking.
3. Place the stock, salt, soy sauce, bamboo shoots, pork, mushrooms, and tiger lily buds in a three-quart saucepan.
4. Bring to a boil over high heat. Reduce heat to low, cover the pan, and simmer for 3 minutes.
5. Add the bean curd, pepper, and vinegar. Return to a boil.
6. Stir the cornstarch mixture until it recombines and pour into the saucepan. Stir until the soup thickens.
7. Slowly pour in the beaten egg, stirring gently. Remove from heat and stir in the sesame seed oil and chopped scallions. Serve immediately.
8. Pour the beaten eggs slowly into the soup, stirring constantly with a fork until the egg forms cooked shreds. Stir in the green onions, red pepper sauce, and sesame oil. Serve hot in individual bowls.
